title: CadStruct raster-only Symbol expert rebuild plan

target.product_goal: Recognize drawing symbols from non-vector raster floorplan images such as PNG scans/renders inside the MoE architecture.
target.runtime_contract: Raster image only. No SVG geometry, CAD parser entities, expected_json, raw_label, semantic_type, gold labels, annotation paths, or offline metadata may be runtime features.
target.offline_label_use: Structured labels from CubiCasa5K/FloorPlanCAD/internal assets may be used only for dataset conversion, training, dev selection, locked evaluation, error mining, and audit.
target.audit_goal: Separate body localization, type classification, candidate inflation, and MoE export safety so weak stages are visible.

historical_svg_candidate_classifier.finding: symbol_fixture_expert_v13 locked macro F1 0.883069 is reproducible but is a CubiCasa/SVG candidate-level classifier with a 9D feature contract and label-derived is_equipment_like feature.
historical_svg_candidate_classifier.decision: Do not claim v13 as non-SVG raster-only symbol performance.

legacy_detector_smoke.decision: Dark connected-component/anchor enumeration is structurally inadequate.

oracle_type_head_smokes.decision: Type recognition is also weak. It needs cached multi-scale crop/context training, not simple crop statistics or online full-image decoding.

model_decision.recommended_architecture: Two-stage auditable expert: tile-based symbol body detector plus cached multi-scale crop/context type head.

body_detector_candidates.name: YOLO11_or_YOLOv10_tile_detector
body_detector_candidates.role: First engineering baseline for small symbol body localization.
body_detector_candidates.why: Fast training/inference, simple data conversion, mature tooling, good for iterative audit.
body_detector_candidates.risk: Requires careful tile overlap, NMS/WBF merge, and candidate inflation control.

body_detector_candidates.name: RT-DETR_or_RT-DETRv2_tile_detector
body_detector_candidates.role: Second candidate if YOLO-style detector has too much duplicate/candidate inflation.
body_detector_candidates.why: End-to-end detector with less reliance on hand-tuned NMS.
body_detector_candidates.risk: Heavier integration and may need more careful hyperparameter tuning.

body_detector_candidates.name: Faster_R-CNN_or_RetinaNet_FPN
body_detector_candidates.why: FPN detectors are stable for small objects and easy to audit in torchvision/MMDetection.
body_detector_candidates.risk: Slower and less convenient for production.

type_head_candidates.name: ConvNeXt-Tiny_or_EfficientNetV2-S_multi_scale_crop_encoder
type_head_candidates.role: Primary type classifier after body proposals.
type_head_candidates.why: Gold-box crop smokes show hand-crafted features are too weak; a pretrained visual encoder is needed.

type_head_candidates.name: context_augmented_type_head
type_head_candidates.role: Add MoE context once crop-only type head is stable.
type_head_candidates.why: Some classes such as bathtub, table, equipment, and column are visually/contextually ambiguous.

not_recommended: Continue tuning dark component/anchor candidate enumeration.
Use symbol_fixture_expert_v13 as proof of raster-only symbol ability.
Use raw_label/semantic_type/SVG-derived candidate type as runtime features.
Rely on a large VLM as the primary coordinate detector for tiny symbols.
Train online full-page crop CNN without a crop cache.

execution_plan.goal: Build cached multi-scale symbol crop/context dataset from datasets/symbol_expert_public_raster_v19.
implementation_steps: Create a cache builder that crops tight, padded, and context windows for each symbol target.
Resize cached crops to fixed sizes such as 64 or 96 while preserving enough context.
Write records with image crop paths, original page id, bbox, label_id, split, source_dataset, area bucket, and stress buckets.
Add rare-class oversampling metadata for bathtub, table, and column.
Add source-integrity audit proving raw_label/semantic_type are labels only, not runtime features.
Avoid repeated full-page decoding during training.

execution_plan.goal: Train a cached multi-scale crop/context type classifier and establish a real type-head baseline.
implementation_steps: Start with ConvNeXt-Tiny or EfficientNetV2-S pretrained on ImageNet if available locally through torch/torchvision.
Use balanced sampling and rare-class oversampling for bathtub/table/column.
Train on tight+padded+context crops; include bbox geometry and page/tile normalized location as non-semantic numeric features.
Select on dev macro F1 and rare-class F1, then evaluate locked once.
Export abstain/fail-closed policy for low-confidence typed labels.

execution_plan.goal: Train a tile-based symbol body detector for raster-only localization.
implementation_steps: Create tile training records from full raster pages with overlap and target clipping.
Train a YOLO11/YOLOv10/RTMDet/RT-DETR-style detector depending on available local dependencies.
Evaluate body recall at center coverage and IoU thresholds separately.
Report candidate inflation, duplicate rate, per-class recall, small-object recall, and large-page stress buckets.
Use WBF/NMS merge only as a transparent postprocessor with audited effects.

execution_plan.goal: Integrate body detector and type head into an auditable MoE symbol expert.
implementation_steps: Run detector proposals through cached type head equivalent at inference.
Export typed labels only when confidence/abstain policy meets precision floor.
Otherwise export generic_symbol or weak_typed_symbol with explicit fail-closed metadata.
Evaluate full locked body+type metrics and contains_symbol recoverable recall.
Update cadstruct_moe symbol wrapper only after locked gates are met.

metrics_protocol.locked_rule: Use dev for selection and locked for final evaluation. Locked labels may be used only for evaluation and error mining.
metrics_protocol.adoption_rule: No symbol model becomes the default MoE export unless it improves locked metrics materially and passes raster-only source-integrity checks.

research_references.topic: Floorplan symbol spotting with tile-based detection
research_references.reference: A Symbol Spotting Approach in Graphical Documents by Pixel-Level Matching, arXiv:2006.00684
research_references.lesson: Architectural symbols are tiny relative to full pages; tile-based training/inference is necessary.

research_references.reference: RT-DETR / DETRs Beat YOLOs on Real-time Object Detection, CVPR 2024
research_references.lesson: End-to-end detection can reduce reliance on hand-tuned NMS if YOLO-style detector creates too many duplicates.
Fast engineering baseline for detection/segmentation with mature tooling.

research_references.reference: Torchvision Faster R-CNN, RetinaNet, FCOS model documentation
research_references.lesson: Useful conservative fallback for small-object detection if YOLO/RT-DETR integration is unstable.

immediate_next_steps.action: Implement scripts/vlm/build_symbol_crop_context_cache_v20.py and generate a smoke cache first.
Validate cache counts, crop readability, source-integrity, and per-label support in reports/vlm/symbol_crop_context_cache_v20_audit.json.
Train the first cached crop/context type head using the cache; compare against the current 0.436258 gold-box handcrafted baseline.
After cache is stable, start tile detector dataset conversion and choose YOLO/RT-DETR/FPN based on local dependency availability.

management_rules: Do not optimize relation/contains_symbol before symbol body and type metrics improve.
Do not report oracle gold-box type-head scores as full detector scores.
Do not use raw_label, semantic_type, SVG class names, or expected_json as runtime features.
Prefer reusable auditable scripts and JSON reports under reports/vlm/.
Completed items should be moved into evidence and removed from active execution_plan in future updates.
